name: chart-pie-stacked
visual_summary: ChartPieStacked is a component used to display a stacked pie chart, suitable for data analysis and visualization needs. It can be used in financial or market dashboards to showcase the composition of pie chart. The component typically consists of a circular shape with multiple segments, each representing a value of the data.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-pie-stacked
Description: ChartPieStacked is a component used to display a stacked pie chart, suitable for data analysis and visualization needs. It can be used in financial or market dashboards to showcase the composition of pie chart. The component typically consists of a circular shape with multiple segments, each representing a value of the data.
Style: material, modern
Interactions: hover, clickable
Tags: data-analysis, visualization, pie-chart, dashboard

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
